Fear and Greed is at
16
(Extreme
Fear)
this morning. Bitcoin tested a monthly low of $58,115 last week
before bouncing back, and the market is now heading into the
final days of June with the monthly close carrying significant
technical weight. Seven straight weeks of ETF outflows have now
pulled $5.96 billion from crypto products, and the major options
expiry has passed.

The dust is settling. But the debate over what caused this
decline and who is responsible is just getting started. The
Ripple CEO is pointing fingers at Strategy's financial model.
Grayscale is calling for a $3 billion Bitcoin sale. And Saylor is
signalling he's buying more anyway.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

Grayscale's Researcher Wants Strategy To Sell Bitcoin Now

Grayscale's head of research said he hopes Strategy will sell
at least $3 billion in Bitcoin to cover its next two years of
cash obligations, arguing it would restore confidence in the
company's capital structure.

He expects Strategy to raise its dividend instead, adding
roughly $100 million in annual obligations.

What does Pandl say a Strategy Bitcoin sale would achieve for
market confidence?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/-arG0_uiXcDrPls0EDlDqQ~~/AAQRxRA~/fctyt0IovodwxZzWXnXXBBAGzZggE0VcD8vvuMQ6kSS2WMhph1kf18hY6vX-OrfCfuBpRRto_3WvTIia7VlSuQpvjYsMuLu0TsEsMcdTYdikpfHxhYvdD1xr0em6j0lQQcmf2v28J6ri430Gtd5Ybbflj6LAUc9F

75208.subject: Quick Hello from Runable!
75208.body:
Hi,

I'm Abhijeet from team Runable. You're one of our most active users, and I
wanted to reach out personally.

We're looking to feature a few people from our community, and before
anything, I'd just love to connect and hear about your experience, what's
working for you, what's getting in your way, and how Runable has been for
you so far.

Would you be open to a quick chat? Please select your preferred time slot:
https://calendly.com/abhijeet-runable/30min

Thanks for being with us,

Abhijeet
Team Runable

75205.subject: Attention Is the New Startup Infrastructure: The Founder's Playbook for Winning in the AI Age 📚
75205.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/attention-startup-infrastructure-playbook

👋 Hey, Linas here! Every day, I break down 3 stories shaping the future of FinTech & Artificial Intelligence - plus the money movements and trends worth tracking. First time here? 395k+ FinTech and AI leaders get this daily. Join them:
A repricing is underway in how startups win, and most founders are still operating on the old terms.
For two decades, the playbook was simple: build a great product, find product-market fit, then layer distribution on top. Marketing was a function. Narrative was a press release. Attention was something you bought or borrowed once you had something worth talking about.
That model is now breaking.
When AI lets anyone build faster, copy faster, and bundle faster, the product alone is no longer the moat. The founder’s ability to make the right people understand the right thing, before the rest of the market catches up, has become the scarcest input in company building.
Erik Torenberg’s “New Media, One Year In” is the clearest articulation yet of this shift. Published in June 2026 as a retrospective on a16z’s New Media team, the essay defines the offering bluntly as “go-direct as a service” for startups, built to help founders “build your brand, reach key people, and win the battle for attention”.
The core argument should make every founder uncomfortable: to win, you must go direct; to go direct, you must be interesting; and in an AI-saturated market, “interesting” is not a personality trait. It is an operating capability you build, instrument, and compound like a product.
And no, this is not a piece about a16z’s content team. It is a playbook for treating attention as infrastructure: the moves, the system, and the metrics founders need to turn narrative into customers, hires, capital, and category ownership.
What Torenberg is really arguing
Strip away the retrospective framing, and Torenberg is making one claim that reorders the founder’s priority stack: startups are games of preferential attachment.
Talent, customers, press, capital, developers, design partners, and early believers must all choose to attach themselves to one company rather than the thousands of credible alternatives competing for the same finite pool of conviction. The scarce resource is therefore not information, and it is not content. The internet has an infinite supply of both. The scarce resource is high-signal attention from the small number of people who can materially change a company’s trajectory.
In Torenberg’s framing, the entire purpose of “new media” is to make a founder legibly interesting to exactly those people. And the most important operational line in the whole essay is this: new media is “not really a type of content” but rather “a type of packaging,” designed to surface what is already true and interesting about the founder and the product.
That single distinction separates founders who win attention from founders who

75191.subject: Cenová po(sh)nuka
75191.body:
Zdravím Ruslana a Oleh ! 💍🤍

Podarilo sa nám sfinalizovať cenovú ponuku na výzdobu.

Cenová ponuka je samozrejme kostra - ak budete chcieť niečo ubrať alebo
pridať, samozrejme zmeny doladíme, pretože ste neposlali žiadne obrázky k
výzdobe, tak sme išli len podľa toho čo sme sa rozprávali..
Radi si prejdeme všetko. Sme otvorení konštruktívnej kritike aj úprimnému
názoru, takže sa nebojíme slov "toto nechcem" alebo "toto sa nám nepáči",
pretože dizajn je veľmi subjektívny pocit. 😊🙏 Nenaceňovali sme obrad,
pretože nevieme ešte čo budeme a kde robiť. :)

Podávam kontakt aj na grafičku.
V prípade záujmu o svadobné oznámania či pozvánky a iné tlačoviny ako
etikety, nálepky a podobne, naša grafička z Dekami.creativ Vám je k
dispozícií, stačí ju kontaktovať, ona už o Vás bude vedieť. Ona bude
samostatne naceňovať tlačoviny (menu, zasadací poriadok...). 😊 Katarína
Nagyová -nagyovakatarina11@gmail.com
www.dekami.sk

Budeme sa tešiť na Vašu spätnú väzbu! 🩷

S pozdravom

Lenka

-- 
S pozdravom

Ing. Lenka Gattiker, MBA
Vaša osobná posh asistentka

Svadobná Agentúra PoshPosh

www.poshposh.sk

75175.subject: 🐶📰 Weekend Update
75175.body:
**BTC** $60,195 (-0.1%) | **ETH** $1,579 (-0.2%) | **SOL** $72 (0.1%)

———————————————————————————

Welcome to the Daily Bone Weekend Update where we recap the top stories from the  week. Be sure to check out our daily newsletter to get all of your news hot off the press each and every weekday!

———————————————————————————

### Headlines

* US Government forced slow rollout of OpenAI’s GPT5.6 due to [“Mythos-like” capabilities](https://x.com/AndrewCurran_/status/2070316740127650061?s=20) — OpenAI executives pushed to [delay IPO](https://x.com/zoomerfied/status/2070245069634895977?s=20) to next year

* US Senate passed resolution to [end military action](https://x.com/coinbureau/status/2069616275979186422?s=20) against Iran — US bombed Iranian targets on the Strait of Hormuz on Friday

* MSTR fell to [23-month low](https://x.com/BullTheoryio/status/2069707909697810482?s=20) — CryptoQuant suggested Strategy [pauses their BTC purchases](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2069612066403762378?s=20) — STRC falls [below $75](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/STRC/)

* Spot Bitcoin ETFs saw [$1.78 in weekly net outflows](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2070414189693173817?s=20) as Bitcoin fell as low as [$58k](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2070146589059092664?s=20)

———————————————————————————

### TradFi

* Apple had its worst day in 14 months as its stock [cratered 6%](https://x.com/Barchart/status/2070397564927524889?s=20) after announcing [price increases](https://x.com/BetaProfiles/status/2070142975930462602?s=20) across the board

* [US PCE inflation](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2070129534087610551?s=20) rose to 3 year high

* South Korea’s [Kospi index](https://x.com/Barchart/status/2070364469104894222?s=20) and [Japan’s Nikkei](https://x.com/Barchart/status/2070377380619633016?s=20) both crashed on Friday

* Ethereum DAT company Bitmine was added to the [Russell 1000](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2070378956172542289?s=20)

———————————————————————————

### Crypto

* The Ethereum Foundation [cut 20%](https://x.com/fintechfrank/status/2069416879643357666?s=20) of its staff — Vitalik spoke on [40% budget cut](https://x.com/VitalikButerin/status/2069431500035023121?s=20) for the foundation this year

* Binance will [stop serving EU clients](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2070391384041717955?s=20) next week after they failed to secure a MiCA license

* Kraken in talks to [acquire Aave](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2070216142942323141?s=20) at a $385M valuation — AAVE is up over 19% on the week and trading at a [$1.4B FDV](https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/aave/)

* [Confidential witness testimony](https://x.com/Insidevoicer/status/2070029946387386752?s=20) suggested Pump Fun was buying early stage tokens and selling them on retail buyers

* Number of crypto VCs fell to [6-year low](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2070131133430600170?s=20)

———————————————————————————

### AI
